name: Name
empty-description: Create a new automation or adjust your filters to keep moving.
unsaved-changes-description: You have unsaved changes in this automation. If you leave now, your edits will be lost.
choose-trigger-description: Select the event that starts this automation.
edit-node-metadata-description: Customize the name and description of this node for better clarity.
delay-helper-description: The delay starts when the trigger fires. Downstream actions wait until this window completes.
subject: Subject
select-document-description: This placeholder will be replaced with the full document when the email is sent.
no-matching-context-title: We couldn't find a matching context
no-matching-context-description: This action may not apply to the current workflow. Select a module or choose a trigger/action to proceed.
event-listen-description: This determines where the event will be listened from.
knowledge-sources-description: Select the records this agent may index and retrieve during an automation run.
knowledge-articles-load-error: Knowledge base articles could not be loaded.
no-knowledge-articles: No published knowledge base articles found.
ai-product-knowledge-enabled: Enable product search for this agent
ai-product-knowledge-description: Define the bounded product scope this agent may index and retrieve. Use categories for large catalogs, then exclude exceptions.
ai-product-scope-description: Large catalogs should use all products or categories instead of selecting every product one by one.
ai-product-include-category-description: All products under the selected categories are indexed in the background.
ai-agent-delete-confirm-message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
ai-agent-input-description: Drag an output variable here. Leave this empty to send the full trigger payload.
ai-agent-input-full-trigger-warning: This action will send the full trigger payload to the AI agent. Add an output variable when only specific data is needed.
trigger-type-description: Start with an automation type that enrolls and triggers off
action-type-description: Pick what should happen next after the automation is triggered
variables-help-description: Use variables from triggers or previous actions to fill fields in the current node.
variables-help-step-select-node: Select a previous node on the canvas.
variables-help-step-search-output: Search for the output you need.
variables-help-step-insert-variable: Click or drag a variable into a supported field.

conversation-event-trigger.validation-error-description: Select at least one conversation event, keep at least one action enabled, and choose the required targets.

assignee.label: Assignee
assignee.description: Trigger when a conversation is assigned or unassigned.

status.label: Status
status.description: Trigger when a conversation opens, closes, or reopens.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Trigger when conversation tags are added or removed.

output-variables-panel-description: Output variables panel will live here.
no-output-variables-description: Add a trigger or action to the workflow and configure it to see available output variables here.
edit-email-content-description: Use the editor to compose your email. Insert variables from the panel on the right to personalize each message.
no-variables-available-description: Add a trigger or configure an action above this node to see available output variables.
split-options-description: Build each split option with segment conditions.
save-condition-before-split: Save each changed condition before saving the split configuration.
form-error: There is some error in the form
explain-topic-selection: Explain when this topic should be selected
execution-history-description: Step-by-step trace of this automation run. Expand each node to inspect inputs, outputs, and timing.
payload-schema-validation-description: Define required properties and data types.
updates-in-realtime: Updates in real-time as you edit.
review-highlighted-fields: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.
create-new-ai-agent: Create a new AI agent to connect your automations to an external AI provider.
email-templates-description: Create and manage reusable email templates for your automations.
create-first-ai-agent-description: Create your first AI agent to start automating conversations with your customers.
pick-existing-agent: Pick an existing agent for editing or create a new one with the same provider contract.
drop-more-files: Drop more files or click to add
agent-ready-for-calls: This agent is ready for provider calls.
agent-needs-attention: This agent still needs attention before execution.
create-new-email-template: Create a new email template for automation
activate-automation-description: This will save your latest changes and start running this automation.
deactivate-automation-description: This will save your latest changes and stop this automation from running.
please-configure-action-form: Please configure the action form before saving
no-headers-added-yet-click: No headers added yet. Click "Add Header" to get started.
reindex-queued-description: Knowledge chunks will refresh in the background.
memory-description: Reuse saved AI results in later steps and optionally persist this AI result for future actions.
read-from-memory-description: Load previously saved automation memory into this AI step.
read-namespace-description: Use the same namespace across related AI actions to share memory.
save-result-to-memory-description: Persist this AI result so later actions can reuse it.
result-path-description: Leave empty to save the whole result. Examples: `topicId`, `attributes`, `text`
ttl-minutes-description: Saved memory expires automatically after this duration.
field-extraction-prompt: Describe what this field should extract from the input
document-type-description: Narrows the document list below to documents of this type.
document-render-description: The selected document is rendered with the trigger/target record and exposed as this action's output.
select-target-to-configure-conditions: Select a target to configure conditions
define-conditions-description: Define conditions that must be met before continuing.
agent-name-description: Give the agent a clear name so it is easy to pick inside automation actions.
agent-description-placeholder: Routes Facebook conversations, classifies intents, and extracts order attributes for downstream automation steps.
agent-description-helper: Describe what this agent is meant to do for the team and for future automation builders.
temperature-description: Lower values keep routing and extraction more deterministic.
max-tokens-description: Caps the length of the AI response so automation steps stay fast.
timeout-ms-description: The automation waits for the provider until this timeout is reached.
model-description: Choose the model this automation agent should use.
gateway-mode-description: Compat keeps one OpenAI-compatible endpoint while the model name selects the downstream provider.
account-id-description: Leave empty to use the platform Cloudflare account.
gateway-id-description: Leave empty to use the platform AI Gateway.
base-url-override-placeholder: Generated from account, gateway, and mode
base-url-override-description: Optional. When empty, the backend builds the Cloudflare Gateway URL from the account, gateway, and mode.
no-email-templates-description: Create your first email template to get started with automated email campaigns.
